programme.title: The Terminal
programme.desc: Eastern European visitor Viktor arrives in New York only to find that his papers are no longer valid. Rules being rules, airport chief Dixon cant let Viktor into America, or let him leave. Viktor has to survive by his wits, and slowly becomes the darling of the airport, as his sweet nature charms all who work there - except Dixon.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Sausage Party
programme.desc: Supermarket perishables devise a plan to escape from their human enemies after Frank the sausage learns that they will eventually become meals.

programme.title: Alfie
programme.desc: In London during the swinging sixties, a promiscuous Cockney lad who lacks purpose or direction habitually seduces women and then moves on. When one of his girlfriends becomes pregnant, he refuses to marry her, preferring instead to carry on with more conquests, but eventually something happens which forces him to reconsider his shallow existence.

programme.title: Instant Family
programme.desc: When Pete and Ellie decide to start a family, they stumble into the world of foster care adoption. They hope to take in one small child, but when they meet three siblings, including a rebellious 15-year-old girl, they find themselves speeding from zero to three kids overnight. Now, Pete and Ellie must try to learn the ropes of instant parenthood in the hope of becoming a family.

programme.title: The School of Rock
programme.desc: After guitarist Dewey is kicked out of his own band, he pretends to be a teacher. When he hears the kids play, he realises they could be his support group in the Battle of the Bands, and hell finally get to be the rock star he knows hes destined to be.

programme.title: Daddys Home 2
programme.desc: Brad and Dustys respective fathers show up to turn Christmastime upside down.

programme.title: Bye Bye Birdie
programme.desc: Based on events surrounding Elvis Presleys experience of the US Army draft, this film focuses on fictional pop star Conrad Birdie, who is called up for National Service, preventing him from starring in the movie that was to make his agent rich. The agent, who needs money to escape from his cantankerous mother, sets up a last performance for his protege. The farewell event attracts legions of adoring fans.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: After 15 years in African bush country, Cady knows all about herd instincts, but nothing has prepared her for high school. She joins a popular but cruelly manipulative crowd of girls known as the `Plastics and secretly mocks them, but the fun stops when one betrays her and steals the boy she fancies.

programme.title: Little Fockers
programme.desc: Greg and Pam have been together for ten years, and now theyre the proud parents of two adorable twins. However, money is tight and in order to keep his family afloat, devoted nurse Greg takes a second job working for a drug company. That development doesnt sit well with Jack, whose previous suspicions regarding his hapless son-in-law soon come back in full force after learning of this development.

programme.title: American Pie 2
programme.desc: Action-packed sequel in which a group of friends are reunited after their freshman year of college and embark upon a series of comical adventures when they rent a summer house on Lake Michigan.

programme.title: Just Friends
programme.desc: An LA record producer returns to his New Jersey hometown ten years after being rejected by his high-school cheerleader crush. Having made the transformation from no-hope geek to Greek god womaniser and with his friend still single, he embarks on a second seduction strategy that does not always go to plan.

programme.title: Jackass: The Movie
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville and his mad companions leap onto the big screen. Expect the usual mad gross-out japes, from making snow cones out of urine to using the display toilets in bathroom outlets, and from racing golf carts over hallowed greens to tightrope walking over alligators.

programme.title: Jackass 3
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville and the gang unleash their most insane stunts yet, from roller-skating with a buffalo herd, to playing tennis with a beehive.

programme.title: Kangaroo Jack
programme.desc: Two childhood friends get caught up in with the mob in New York and find themselves forced to travel to Australia to deliver $50,000. Their trouble really starts when they reach the outback, and a kangaroo bounds away with the cash.

programme.title: Kangaroo Jack

programme.title: The Angels Share
programme.desc: A troubled young father barely avoids jail and, after visiting a whisky distillery, he is inspired to find a way out of his hopeless life.

programme.title: Golda
programme.desc: During the Yom Kippur War in 1973, Israeli Prime Minister Golda Meir must navigate overwhelming odds, a sceptical cabinet, and a complex relationship with US Secretary of State Henry Kissinger as millions of lives hang in the balance.

programme.title: The Bridges at Toko-Ri
programme.desc: A conflicted Navy pilot and veteran of the Second World War questions the role he is forced to play when he is called back into service for the Korean War.

programme.title: Cool Hand Luke
programme.desc: A gutsy prisoner earns the admiration of inmates and the wrath of guards by constant defiance and bids for freedom.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Hard-drinking country music star Jackson Maine discovers, and falls in love with, a struggling but talented singer named Ally. As her career quickly takes off, Jackson starts to realize that his best days may be behind him.

programme.title: Lost in Translation
programme.desc: In Tokyo shooting a whisky commercial, middle-aged actor Bob Harris becomes attracted to Charlotte, the young wife of a celebrity photographer. Together they ride out their boredom of hotel life and their bewilderment of the city.

programme.title: Valentines Day
programme.desc: Following a group of Los Angeles residents who try to find their way through the highs and lows of love during a single day.

programme.title: Dunkirk
programme.desc: Germany advances into France, trapping Allied troops on the beaches of Dunkirk. Under air and ground cover from British and French forces, troops are slowly and methodically evacuated from the beach using every vessel that can be found.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: A Secret Service agent-turned-bodyguard finds danger and romance while protecting an entertainer from a stalker.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: A sports agent who makes the mistake of saying what he believes, finds himself sacked and abandoned by all his clients apart from small time footballer Rod Tidwell. Maguires personal life starts to fall apart as hes torn between love and money in Cameron Crowes metaphor on Americans need for success and money.

programme.title: About Time
programme.desc: After discovering that he can travel through time, a young man uses his ability to win the woman of his dreams and save his friend from professional disaster.

programme.title: Lost in Translation
programme.desc: In Tokyo shooting a whisky commercial, middle-aged actor Bob Harris becomes attracted to Charlotte, the young wife of a celebrity photographer. Together they ride out their boredom of hotel life and their bewilderment of the city.

programme.title: The Blind Side
programme.desc: Michael Oher is a poor and undereducated African-American teenager who lived all his life on the streets. His tremendous size and quickness makes him a perfect athlete and attracts the interest if a wealthy and conservative suburban family who take him in and groom him both athletically and academically.

programme.title: The Blind Side

His tremendous size and quickness makes him a perfect athlete and attracts the interest if a wealthy and conservative suburban family who take him in and groom him both athletically and academically.

programme.title: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: WWII evacuee David hates the Germans, but now his life has been saved by one. What is the right thing to do, tell the Army or offer his help?

programme.title: Spy Kids 3: Game Over
programme.desc: The Spy Kids set off on their third adventure. Secret Agent Carmen finds herself trapped in a 3-D virtual reality video game designed by their new arch nemesis, the Toymaker. Juni must save his sister, as they battle it out against lifelike 3-D monsters, completing each progressively harder level and ultimately trying to save the youth of the world.

programme.title: Blueback
programme.desc: After Dora suffers a stroke, her adult daughter, Abby returns to her coastal Australian hometown to help with her recovery. To try to coax Dora out of her nonverbal state, Abby tells her stories from her childhood, recalling Doras activism.

programme.title: Jack the Giant Slayer
programme.desc: A young farmhand gets swept into the realm of legend when he must defend his land from a seemingly unstoppable force of giant warriors.

programme.title: Blithe Spirit
programme.desc: A spiritualist medium holds a seance for a writer suffering from writers block but accidentally summons the spirit of his deceased first wife which leads to an increasingly complex love triangle with his current wife of five years.

programme.title: The Mountain
programme.desc: Raised outside of her M?ori culture, tween Sam sets out on a mission with two other misfits to reconnect with her tupuna: Taranaki Maunga. Together, the three go on an unconventional journey and discover the power of friendship.

programme.title: Pokemon Detective Pikachu
programme.desc: A young man joins forces with Detective Pikachu to unravel the mystery behind his fathers disappearance. Chasing clues through the streets of Ryme City, the dynamic duo soon discover a devious plot that poses a threat to the Pokemon universe.

programme.title: The BFG
programme.desc: A 10-year-old girl, Queen Victoria and the Big Friendly Giant must devise a plan to get rid of Bloodbottler, Fleshlumpeater and all the other bad giants once and for all.

programme.title: Jack the Giant Slayer
programme.desc: A young farmhand gets swept into the realm of legend when he must defend his land from a seemingly unstoppable force of giant warriors.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit and his three sisters -- Flopsy, Mopsy and Cotton-Tail -- enjoy spending their days in Mr. McGregors vegetable garden. When one of McGregors relatives suddenly moves in, hes less than thrilled to discover a family of rabbits in his new home. A battle of wills soon breaks out as the new owner hatches scheme after scheme to get rid of Peter -- a resourceful rabbit who proves to be a worthy and wily opponent.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: A high school senior befriends a strange subterranean creature after building a monster truck from bits and pieces of scrapped cars.

programme.title: The Borrowers
programme.desc: Based on the Mary Norton novels about a four-inch-tall family who live beneath the floorboards of a human house. The familys future is threatened when the house falls into the hands of an evil lawyer who plans to destroy it.

programme.title: Journey to the Center of the Earth
programme.desc: Volcanologist Trevor Anderson journeys into the Earths core after discovering evidence that the famous authors story was based on fact. Accompanied by his teenage nephew Sean and fellow scientist Hannah, Trevor is soon coming face-to-face with an astonishing and extremely perilous hidden world.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop
programme.desc: Paul Blart desperately wants to become a cop, but he is too fat to pass the physical exam. He instead works as a security guard in a shopping mall. One day criminals put the mall under siege, and Blart takes it upon himself to save the day.

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: The Island of Lost Dreams
programme.desc: The sequel in which the globetrotting sibling duo attempt to reclaim the powerful Transmooker device from the clutches of a mad scientist. Their quest leads them to his tropical island hideaway, which he shares with an assortment of mutant creatures.

Before this can be achieved, the budding promoters must overcome several hurdles and sort out their turbulent love lives.

programme.desc: Axel Foley and his Beverly Hills buddies investigate criminal activities at a Southern California amusement park.

programme.title: Junk and Disorderly

programme.desc: Everything seems like business as usual in West Covina, until a crazy-looking vintage Mercury Zephyr pulls up, revealing an old friend. Darrell and his buddy stumble over the ultimate Sketch artist.

programme.desc: Its a regular father and son shootout in Victorville, as Ivy and Pops try to prove who among them is the most profitable. Brandis secret weapon lands her more than she bargained for but luckily, Kenny is there to brighten her day.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Barry rolls up to Riverside with his own masked bidder, and the two develop a winning strategy. Brandi and Danielles mystery balls take them to South America... sort of. Rene needs a cleanse after going through his risque room.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Lisa decides to be fact-based in Placentia, inadvertently complicating international relations. Ivy and his son conjure up a locker with some mysterious sports equipment. Rene wont be taken advantage of, and it allows him to record a nice win.

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Secrets Declassified With David Duchovny
programme.desc: From the seemingly innocuous childrens toy engineered to save an informant, to hirsute-inspired movie disguises, your governments most clandestine inventions are never what you would suspect, and thats exactly why no one never saw them coming.

programme.title: Secrets Declassified With David Duchovny
programme.desc: They say better the devil you know, but what happens when you have to hold hands with him? When governments strike dark deals with cults, mobs and even sworn enemies, frosty relationships and mounting tensions are tested head on.

programme.desc: Michael gets in trouble when he sends out an inappropriate Christmas card, and tensions mount on the party planning committee when Angela vetos every idea that Karen comes up with, causing Karen to break off and plan a Christmas party of her own.

programme.desc: Its lights out at the Shanghai International Circuit for the 2025 Chinese Grand Prix. The then three-time world champion Max Verstappen claimed race victory here a year ago.

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: Its lights out at Suzuka for the 2025 Japanese Grand Prix. A year ago, Max Verstappen led a Red Bull one-two with former teammate Sergio Perez.

programme.desc: Its lights out for the 2025 Bahrain Grand Prix. Max Verstappen led a Red Bull one-two in the Sakhir season opener at Bahrain International Circuit last campaign.

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: Its lights out in Jeddah for the 2025 Saudi Arabian Grand Prix. Reigning world champion Max Verstappen crossed the finish line in P1 last season at the Jeddah Corniche Circuit.

programme.desc: Its lights out at the Miami International Autodrome in Florida for the 2025 Miami Grand Prix. Last season, Lando Norris took the top step, finishing ahead of Max Verstappen.

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: Its lights out at Imola for the 2025 Emilia Romagna Grand Prix. Last season, reigning world champion Max Verstappen held off a late Lando Norris charge to claim race victory.

programme.title: Fools Rush In
programme.desc: A cargo full of diamonds gets taken over by Pirates.

programme.title: The Strange Love of Martha Ivers

programme.title: The Long Duel
programme.desc: An idealistic colonial police officer is sent to capture a rebel leader who threatens the stability of the Rajs north-west frontier. Despite his official colonial capacity, the policeman is impressed by the ingenuity and integrity of his enemy and is determined to arrest him alive rather than bring him in dead as his superiors might wish.

programme.desc: An adaptation of George Orwells classic comic novel about an advertising executive who rebels against the system and a life ruled by money. programme.title: The Greatest Auction
programme.desc: A guitar amp used by Jimi Hendrix draws in collectors and dealers. An ornate chair complete with pagan carvings sparks a bidding war. Theres also a bizarre hoard of celebrity hair. And a vintage travel trunk from the 1930s goes under the hammer.

programme.title: Flipping Profit
programme.desc: Antiques expert Mark Stacey, wheeler dealer Tony Wong and Zoe Pocock head to Exeter to find bargains they can turn into a profit. The three experts try to outdo each other by scouring the citys antique shops, scrap yards and flea markets in search of any items they can convert to cash.

programme.title: Highclere: Behind the Scenes
programme.desc: Exclusive access to the real Downton Abbey - Highclere Castle - following the highs and lows of the colourful modern-day Lord and Lady Carnarvon and their staff.

programme.title: Country House Auction
programme.desc: Castle Durrow sets the stage, as four unique antiques have their moment under the hammer. A Fender guitar signed by the Rolling Stones piques the interest of dealer Ian. And a 400 year-old Tibetan dagger made from a meteorite prompts a bidding war.

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: Summer is in full swing. In the Cairngorms, Roberts cattle get their first taste of freedom and fresh grass. Jennis alpacas meanwhile, need a short back and sides from a specialist shearer. In North Uist, the herd is being prepared for an epic journey across a tidal sandbar, linking the stunning island of Vallay to the mainland and the crofts bulls. And in Moray, Nikki and Ollie are at last about to complete one of their holiday pods.

programme.desc: For many farmers, summer means one thing - show season - and the Royal Highland Show is the highlight in the calendar. The Barclays boys are showing pedigree Beltex and their finest Suffolks before going head-to-head in the Young Handlers competition. Hopes are pinned on their Cheviot lamb Patch to prove shes every bit as good as Camy predicted.

programme.title: James Mays Things You Need to Know...
programme.desc: How well do you know Albert Einstein? James May reveals some of the lesser known facts about the 20th centurys most iconic scientist by answering some big questions about Einsteins life and theories. Who wanted Einstein for President? How did a man falling off a roof change our universe? Whatever happened to Einsteins brain?

programme.title: James Mays Things You Need to Know...
programme.desc: Do you really know whats happening inside your head? With the aid of some mind boggling animation and motion graphics, James May cranks open your cranium to get the answers from 100 billion whizzing neurons on questions like why men dont ask for directions, why your memory is so bad and what love has in common with Class A drugs.

programme.title: Worlds Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Sue Perkins and Liza Tarbuck drive the legendary Ho Chi Minh Trail, a network of dangerous roads hacked through mountains and jungles of Laos and Vietnam. Its role in the Vietnam War has left it one of the most perilous roads in the world as it is littered with unexploded bombs. Sue and Liza face a gruelling drive to some of the least explored sections of the trail.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy, Richard and James go all rural as they harness a group of high-tech tractors and attempt to grow their own petrol. programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Chicken and Egg
programme.desc: Si and Dave lift the lid on the origins story of one of the worlds favourite fast foods - Southern Fried Chicken. Richmond, Virginia is home to an African American community - many of whom are direct descendants of the 19th century agricultural slaves. Chicken was of such low status at the time that the slaves were allowed to rear their own chickens and ultimately offered them a route to freedom.

programme.sub-title: Terri, Esme and the Chi Family

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Veterinarian Noel Fitzpatrick is one of Englands top animal doctors and the subject of 2010 documentary programme `The Bionic Vet, which showcased some of the work done at his Surrey clinic. On `The Supervet Fitzpatrick and his staff treat some of the countrys hardest-to-cure pets with cutting-edge treatments and surgery. The programme tells the emotional stories of the pets, their owners and the passionate team that push the boundaries of veterinary medicine to save the animals from life-threatening conditions.

programme.title: The Supervet

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs Sake
programme.sub-title: Terri, Esme and the Chi Family
programme.desc: Pete meets the four-legged friends that call the UKs leading dog welfare charity, Dogs Trust, home. From when they are rescued, Pete plays an instrumental role in their rehabilitation process, right up until the point the dogs are safely rehomed.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Veterinarian Noel Fitzpatrick is one of Englands top animal doctors and the subject of 2010 documentary programme `The Bionic Vet, which showcased some of the work done at his Surrey clinic. On `The Supervet Fitzpatrick and his staff treat some of the countrys hardest-to-cure pets with cutting-edge treatments and surgery. The programme tells the emotional stories of the pets, their owners and the passionate team that push the boundaries of veterinary medicine to save the animals from life-threatening conditions.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Supervet Noel Fitzpatrick returns to help more animals with hard-to-cure ailments. Noel and his team help a giant Newfoundland puppy called Lola. Also, a golden Labrador needs a bionic solution for a deformed front paw.

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: Kirstine and Phil have not spent a day apart in four years, but following an emergency during labour the pair find themselves separated. How will they cope?

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: This episode explores life at Liverpool Womens Hospital through the eyes of its only male midwife, former navy trauma medic Chris.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Sam and Tony are called to a woman suffering excruciating stomach pains, but soon find themselves dealing with a sudden seizure. Dino and Dave try to help a baby.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Life on the Edge

programme.desc: Simon Reeve visits the tropical Indian Ocean islands of Madagascar, Mauritius and the Seychelles. programme.title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile
programme.desc: Reet, a driven journalist, is trapped in an *atta-satta* marriage. Battling family secrets and societal norms, she fights for justice and love while navigating her marital life.

programme.title: Vasudha
programme.desc: Vasudha, a cheerful maid, joins business leader Chandrikas home. Despite differing beliefs, she seeks Chandrikas approval and struggles to fit into her elite world.
